MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER HELEN ROSE GRIFFIN'S MOTION FOR WRITS OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDATE (CCP SECTION 1094.5) AND ORDINARY MANDATE (CCP SECTION 1085).

APPEARANCES: Michael Keys, Esq. & Angela Poon, Esq. of Bay Area Legal Aid 982-1300 for petitioner & moving party; Jennifer C. Addams, Deputy Atty General 703-5382 for respondents & opposing parties.

RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Writs Of Administrative Mandate And Ordinary Mandate
Off Calendar Sep-28-2011 Continued To Oct-13-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER HELEN GRIFFIN'S MOTION FOR WRITS OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDATE AND ORDINARY MANDATE.

APPEARANCES: Angela Poon, Esq. of Bay Area Legal Aid 982-1300 for petitioner & moving party; no other appearances.
